steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Identify hash type using hashid utility to determine cracking mode
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for password attack workflow
steps.expected_output: Identified hash type with Hashcat/John mode numbers for cracking

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Attempt password cracking using John with rockyou wordlist dictionary
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Cracked passwords recovered from hash file via dictionary attack

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Use Hashcat with matching hash mode and wordlist for GPU-accelerated cracking
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Additional cracked passwords using Hashcat's superior performance

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Generate custom wordlist using CeWL crawling target website for domain context
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Custom wordlist containing target-specific words and potential password patterns

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Apply mutation rules like best64 to expand dictionary with variations
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Expanded wordlist with rule-based mutations increasing crack rate

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Perform online password spraying using Hydra or CrackMapExec against services
steps.expected_output: Valid credentials discovered through account spraying attempts

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Document all cracked credentials with success rates for reporting
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive password cracking report with success metrics and recovered credentials
